note: bot_core.py only. Add market cooldown after stop_loss and gap_stop exits, matching the existing near_resolution cooldown pattern.

context.problem: When a stop_loss or gap_stop fires, the market cooldown is NOT set. The model_bridge immediately re-recommends the same market on the next loop and the bot re-enters. This caused 4 stop_losses on mlb-col-sd-2026-04-09 in ~3 hours (02:36, 03:27, 03:53, 04:50 UTC), bleeding ~$54 in avoidable losses before the game ultimately resolved in COL's favor.
context.current_behavior: Only 'near_resolution' exits set a cooldown (600s). stop_loss, gap_stop, and trailing_stop exits set no cooldown.
desired_behavior: stop_loss exit → set 1800s cooldown on that market_id
gap_stop exit → set 3600s cooldown on that market_id (gap moves are severe, longer recovery needed)
trailing_stop exit → set 900s cooldown (optional, lower priority — trailing_stop is a healthy exit)
context.evidence: Trade sequence on mlb-col-sd-2026-04-09: id=206 stop_loss 02:46 → id=207 re-entry 02:47 (1 minute gap). id=208 stop_loss 03:42 → id=209 re-entry 03:42 (same minute). id=210 stop_loss 04:13 → id=211 re-entry 04:15 (2 minutes).

implementation.where: In the exit loop, lines 552-557. The existing near_resolution cooldown block is the pattern to follow.
replace_with: logger.info("Cooldown set for market %s (near_resolution exit)", trade.market_slug[:30])
logger.info("Cooldown set for market %s (stop_loss exit, 30m)", trade.market_slug[:30])
logger.info("Cooldown set for market %s (gap_stop exit, 60m)", trade.market_slug[:30])
notes: _market_cooldown is already checked in check_entry_gates() — no other changes needed.
trailing_stop is intentionally omitted for now: trailing_stop is a healthy exit (profit protection), cooldown would prevent re-entry on genuinely good markets.
Cooldown durations are conservative: 30m for stop_loss (market may recover), 60m for gap_stop (severe price dislocation).

steps: Confirm the elif stop_loss and elif gap_stop blocks are present after the near_resolution block
Restart bot and confirm next stop_loss exit logs 'Cooldown set for market ... (stop_loss exit, 30m)'

do_not: Edit risk.py, core/risk.py, or any file other than bot_core.py
Add cooldown for take_profit — that is a clean profitable exit
